title: Vanilla Bean
description: A tried and true classic! Made with whole Madagascar vanilla beans, it's the perfect scoop.

title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup
description: Creamy chocolate ice cream studded with chopped peanut butter cups.

title: Mint Oreo
description: Our cool peppermint ice cream is riddled with Oreo cookie pieces (no pesky green dye included).

title: Mud Pie
description: Milk Chocolate ice cream with a ribbon of house-made marshmallow meringue, and plenty of our Oreo cookie crust bits...deeelicious!

title: Black Licorice
description: An old-timey classic flavor we love to bring bring back every now and again! Pure anise goodness (no icky food coloring required).

title: Jellybean
description: We churned up a creamy base with hints of vanilla and lemon, then riddled it with the holy grail of jelly beans (Starburst, obviously).

title: Strawberries-N-Cream
description: It's always a classic-- the perfectly balanced strawberry ice cream, made with lots (and lots) of strawberries and fresh sweet cream.

title: Vegan Almond w/ Orange Marmalade
description: Vegan, coconut milk ice cream with toasted almonds and a swirl of housemade orange marmalade.
